requirements.summary: Update Odisha subsidy structure values to correct amounts across all language variants
acceptanceCriteria: OdishaGuide subsidy tier card for 1 kW shows Central ₹30,000 + State ₹25,000 = ₹55,000 total
OdishaGuide subsidy tier card for 2 kW shows Central ₹60,000 + State ₹50,000 = ₹1,10,000 total
OdishaGuide subsidy tier card for 3 kW+ shows Central ₹78,000 + State ₹60,000 = ₹1,38,000 total with 'Maximum cap' label
All subsidy values are consistent across English, Hindi, and Odia translations in translations.ts
No other subsidy figures or layout changes are made

file_operations.description: Update the Odisha subsidy structure values in all three language variants (English, Hindi, Odia) under the odishaGuide translation keys. For 1 kW tier: set central to ₹30,000, state to ₹25,000, total to ₹55,000. For 2 kW tier: set central to ₹60,000, state to ₹50,000, total to ₹1,10,000. For 3 kW+ tier: set central to ₹78,000, state to ₹60,000, total to ₹1,38,000 with Maximum cap label. Ensure consistent numeric formatting and currency symbols across all three language objects. Do not modify any other translation strings outside the Odisha subsidy tiers.

Review the component to ensure it correctly displays the updated subsidy values from translations.ts. Verify that the subsidy tier cards render the central, state, and total amounts for each tier (1 kW, 2 kW, 3 kW+) without hardcoded values. Confirm the component uses translation keys for all subsidy amounts and labels. Do not change the visual layout, card styling, animations, or any logic beyond verifying correct data binding to the updated translation values.
